reasoning: The control CA-7 (1) focuses on continuous monitoring and independent assessment. In Kubernetes, continuous monitoring can be mapped to audit logging and network policy monitoring. Ensuring that audit logging is enabled and captures necessary metadata aligns with the continuous monitoring aspect. Network policy monitoring can be achieved by ensuring that network policies are in place and changes are logged. Admission controllers can also be configured to log changes and enforce policies, which supports independent assessment.
title: Continuous Monitoring | Independent Assessment
